data.title: Planet Lunch News
Bybit CEO Urges eXch To Rethink Stance On Hacked Funds
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on February 23, Bybit CEO Ben Zhou expressed on the X platform that the current situation transcends Bybit or any single entity, emphasizing the industry's collective stance against hackers. Zhou urged eXch to reconsider its position and assist in preventing the outflow of funds. He highlighted the support from Interpol and international regulatory bodies in efforts to stop these funds, which is not solely for Bybit's benefit.

Previously, it was reported that eXch declined Bybit's request to intercept the funds. A significant amount of ETH has already been laundered through eXch and converted into BTC, XMR, and other cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Ben Zhou calls out to eXch: Hope to reconsider preventing Bybit hacker funds from flowing out of eXch
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bybit CEO Ben Zhou called out to eXch: "At this moment, it has nothing to do with Bybit or any entity, but our general attitude towards hackers as an industry. I sincerely hope that @eXch
can reconsider and help us stop the funds from flowing out of them. We have also received help from Interpool and international regulators. Helping to stop these funds is not just helping Bybit."
Previously, eXch rejected Bybit's request to intercept funds, and a large amount of ETH was transferred through eXch mixing.

data.title: Suspected Institutional Address Engages In Significant OTC Transactions With Bybit
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Arkham has detected a suspected institutional address, identified as 0xbA…85ae, engaging in over-the-counter (OTC) transactions with Bybit. Between February 22 at 1:03 and February 23 at 12:39 UTC+8, this address transferred a total of 22,600 ETH to Bybit in five separate transactions. Additionally, the address withdrew 73,599,000 USDT from Bybit.

data.title: Platforms Urged To Enhance Risk Controls On eXch Funds
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 23, SlowMist's Cosine highlighted that a significant amount of ETH has been laundered through eXch and converted into BTC, XMR, and other cryptocurrencies. As a result, all platforms are advised to increase their risk control measures for funds originating from eXch.

data.title: Robinhood CEO declares prediction markets the “future” of trading and information
data.description:
Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev is optimistic about the prediction market's potential, noting that his company is betting big on it.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/robinhood-prediction-markets-are-future/

data.title: Kanye West has another public Nazi meltdown over meme coin collab with Binance’s CZ
data.description:
Kanye West (now Ye) had quite an eventful Saturday. The American rapper and businessman had yet another full-on Nazi meltdown, after failing to get Changpeng Zhao’s (CZ) phone number. Ye first teased plans for launching his “real” coin, then spiraled into a racial slur-filled tirade, as per usual. The hitmaker shared a chat with Mikey […]

data.title: Bitcoin Price Poised For Rapid Recovery Amid ‘Everything Bubble’ Crash
data.description:
Renowned investor Robert Kiyosaki made news again, predicting that massive market-wide failure would affect stocks, bonds, real estate, gold, silver, and Bitcoin. However, Kiyosaki sees Bitcoin’s price decline as a chance to purchase an asset that will recover quickly from the Everything Bubble. According to Kiyosaki, Bitcoin’s market downturn marks an attractive moment for investors […]

data.title: Arc Top Whales Increase Holdings Despite Losses
data.description: According to Odaily, on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa has reported that the top four arc whales have increased their holdings by $2.41 million. Despite this investment, they are still experiencing an unrealized loss of $2.84 million.
